meta.description:
WhatsApp from Meta is a FREE messaging and video calling app. It’s used by over 2B people in more than 180 countries. It’s simple, reliable, and private, so you can easily keep in touch with your friends and family. WhatsApp works across mobile and desktop even on slow connections, with no subscription fees*.
    
 
  Private messaging across the world
 
  Your personal messages and calls to friends and family are end-to-end encrypted. No one outside of your chats, not even WhatsApp, can read or

recent.text: whatsapp very. bad service not proper work in my other works
Why all this for closing my account stupid app
let the video calls and voice calls be more clear
The app is taking too much time nowadays to backup whatsapp chats then before, even I have only less than 500 MB data and 5G net it takes more than hour
it's a beautiful app for message,video call audio call
It's more interested app, I'm enyoy when I using this app
No viable competition, no app comes close.
not bad but meta must do to remove channels otherwise ut lost its market
Worst app always an issue with sync

Whatsapp is really nice app and easy to use. But I feel the recent updates are really unnecessary. The channel option,horizontal status view are not convenient and i hate to view or keep status nowadays. it don't feel like we are using WhatsApp. Please don't mixup other app features with WhatsApp. Keepup it's uniqueness which is simple and user friendly.
why my whatsapp messenger not working
After I select a gif I want to see it full screen and write a message before sending it! Why you removed this feature?! This app is getting better everyday!!!
Why am I seeing ads on whatsapp. This is so bad.
How do I download the pictures to my media?

Customer support is basically useless. Once they make a decision, there’s no proper way to contact them or explain your side. Even false reports can get your account permanently banned anytime, and you’re left with no option to appeal.

Customer support is basically useless. Once they make a decision, there’s no proper way to contact them or explain your side. Even false reports can get your account permanently banned anytime, and you’re left with no option to appeal.
you locked my account for no reason
The app is very good for end to end privacy... the inbuilt ai make the work easy......

helpful_positive.text: I can't stand AI and Meta products. In every other context I avoid using them, but I'm required by my employer to use this trash while I'm at work. It's one of the most annoying chat apps I've ever had the displeasure of working with. You have to download pictures to see them, you have to turn automatic picture downloads off, and it's an extreme chore to do so.

FONTS .... The Scan for Fonts (at the bottom of the Theme it page in Settings) does NOT scan all folders on the phone. I have many more fonts in my download folder (in a Font folder I made there) than it finds when scanning and there is no way to add search parameters so these other fonts can be found and put to use in the theme it settings. It would be helpful to know how to add search parameters and to know why it only searches for "packages" rather than indivudual fonts.

WhatsApp works really well overall. It's a great alternative to texting if you don't have unlimited texts. However, sometimes it can be finicky, particularly with video and voice calls. it also won't let you do your Duolingo lesson the background of a call. You can't hear your lesson over the call. There are times that I know my Wi-Fi is just fine and it says that I need to change my location. The chat functions are quite nice.

I love Whatsapp but I don't like the new change for the about section, there used to be more characters allowed on the bio, and it could stay for as long as you wanted it to, now it's limited to a certain amount of characters and it can be set for a number of days. I missed when you could change it whenever you wanted, rather than it having an automatic set date to remove it. not to say that it is a bad feature, it is helpful, but I wish it could have both options.

makes it easier to communicate with groups as well as people from different countries. I enjoy the video call, when my internet glitches, it gives a second to reconnect instead of dropping the call. I also like how you dont have to hold down the record button for videos or voice messages. sometimes the voice message button doesn't work well for me (might just be me). when searching through a message thread it is nice that you can click the 3 dots & press media instead of scrolling forever. (:

The app is good, but the only issue that I am constantly having with the app is it's automatic translator... It gives you the option to set up automatic translation, but sometimes it works and a lot of times it doesn't, and I have to constantly go in and manually translate messages even though I've set it up to do it automatically... PLEASE FIX THIS!!!

WhatsApp is in general good but has some disadvantages. Firstly, it automatically deleted messages I try to send many times and does not let me edit messages when I typed something wrong, showing a completely different message. Apart from that, it has a feature which lets you post things happening with music on it. The voice recordings are high quality and there isn't much delay ( apart from whenever I try to edit a message) Overall, very good

Not receiving notifications of new messages or missed calls. Also. voice/video calls are not ringing, and missed calls show only once I open the app. Phone does not ring when calls are coming thru so I'm not aware of a call coming in. Both phone and app notifications are on, as are ring tones for regular phone calls. Most often missed calls show up several hours to days later. I've had this app for several years now and this started happening only in the last few months.

I would imagine WhatsApp to have their own cloud to save my photos, but apparently it wants to use the memory on my phone. Maybe, something changed that I am not aware. Either way, it is a great app, makes clear phone calls, messages, and even other great security features. I wonder if one day offer a safe browsing software or inform you or block those phishing links.

Currently using the "lock immediately" feature on WhatsApp and every time I enter my code to open the app it closes and it takes a couple tries before I amablento fully use the app. Also, I get notified of a message, when I go to check the message isn't there, but the notificattion still is, then I have to exit the app multiple times and go back to finally recieve the message. Please fix as it is frustrating to use.

helpful_negative.text: Hello, the latest WhatsApp update has introduced changes that I find quite inconvenient. Earlier, status updates were displayed in a straightforward vertical list, which I preferred. Now, they’re arranged in a horizontal format, which feels less user-friendly. Additionally, the Updates tab is now filled with channels and their options, which I don’t find useful. The previous design was simpler and more practical. I hope WhatsApp reconsiders and brings back the older layout. Thanks

I hate to leave 1 star just to get someone's attention. but the recent update made any vertical video from the phone into incomprehensible mess. landscape mode video is fine. I don't know how to fix it. and as you know there isn't a way to downgrade WhatsApp into a previous stable version. so now I am stuck until someone know about this problem.

My experience with WhatsApp has been pleasant until very recently. Since the last update, when I share any link in a message, I can no longer add any caption or comment about the link before sharing (unlike before). From now on, I have to edit to insert commentary after sharing to say something about the link. Please fix this issue ASAP. Thanks.

It was.. nice Now, it has become.. amazing. If I want to video Call my Family, then I would have to Message them first, Attempt to Audio Call once, Message again, Attempt to Video Call once again, Message again, Attempt to Audio Call once again & repeat many more times. After this, the Message is delivered & THEN I can video call my Family. Yeah.. Surprisingly, this Offer applies only when I want to call my Family. Restarting Phone doesn't help. Sometimes, I have to Normal Call. Thanks, Whatsapp

From my point of view, WhatsApp is a fantastic messaging app that makes it easy to stay in touch with friends and family. I appreciate its simplicity and the ability to send messages, share photos, and make voice or video calls for free. The end-to-end encryption gives me peace of mind about privacy. However, I also see the downside of constant notifications and the pressure to respond quickly. Overall, I think WhatsApp is a great tool for communication, as long as it’s used mindfully.

Update mid '25. I have used WhatsApp for ages now, but still, they haven't sorted out yet a better solution for the storage of the media sent over the chats. Why a different folder for WhatsApp media? Why do you force me to have a photo I already have in my phone (because I took it) also in the "sent" folder as a duplicate? Also, the new video limit of size/duration is a nightmare. You don't even storage people's media, what's you problem? that's just annoying

1. Issues with notifications and calls - they don't show up until the app is opened. There has been no notification about the calls at all for a long time. 2. The audio quality is terrible, to the point of just muffled noise. The background noise is too amplified. Please look into the matter :)

The photo sending function is rather messed up after the update, despite clicking on "view more" to see all of my folders I only get a handful. Accidentally sending gifs while scrolling or without adding a caption is rather irritating due to the one click and send function and for the past few days whenever I search gifs I am met with "check your device's internet connection" which hardly goes away....

For some reason my locked chats folder is no longer visible. The only responses I got from WhatsApp was from their bot, that after offering solutions that I tried and none worked said it was puzzled. Rather than a human agent entering the chat, the bot changed the subject and said that they don't provide support for the other subject that has nothing to do with my matter. Then it stopped responding. Do better WhatsApp. I have work-related chats I cannot access because of this failing.

Almost every day, my WhatsApp account gets banned without any apparent reason. Changing my number is no longer an option, and WhatsApp support has been unhelpful. Furthermore, the new security system is problematic; it keeps logging me out of my account, either immediately after I relogin or within a few hours of restoring access, even though I have not violated any of the platform's rules. This is frustrating and unfair. I'm really disappointed with WhatsApp's service and have decided to quit.
